scripts.format:check: prettier --check AGENTS.md README.md TUTOR_ARCHITECTURE.md package.json .github/workflows/graphify-refresh.yml server.ts src/views/AdminView.tsx src/views/RevisionView.tsx src/lib/brainRuntimeSettings.ts src/lib/tutorBook.json server/web-search.ts tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.format: prettier --write AGENTS.md README.md TUTOR_ARCHITECTURE.md package.json .github/workflows/graphify-refresh.yml server.ts src/views/AdminView.tsx src/views/RevisionView.tsx src/lib/brainRuntimeSettings.ts src/lib/tutorBook.json server/web-search.ts tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.test: rm -rf .tmp-test && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/server.mjs && esbuild server/web-search.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/web-search.mjs && esbuild src/memory/evidence.mastery.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/evidence.mastery.mjs && esbuild src/memory/evidence.ledger.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/evidence.ledger.mjs && esbuild src/memory/tool.jobs.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/tool.jobs.mjs && esbuild src/memory/model.runs.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/model.runs.mjs && esbuild src/memory/memory.events.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/memory.events.mjs && esbuild src/memory/retrieval.events.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/retrieval.events.mjs && esbuild src/memory/correction.events.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/correction.events.mjs && esbuild src/memory/artifact.records.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/artifact.records.mjs && esbuild src/memory/beta.diagnostics.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/beta.diagnostics.mjs && esbuild src/memory/revision.evidence.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/revision.evidence.mjs && esbuild src/memory/flashcard.concepts.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=.tmp-test/flashcard.concepts.mjs && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
